title: BounceStyles
description:
Data-driven GeckoLib Cosmetics mod
Originally created for BounceSMP
body: # BounceStyles A Custom Outfits mod, using GeckoLib, made for BounceSMP. Make your own cosmetic outfits in Blockbench, and use GeckoLib animations to bring them to life! BounceStyles is a mod that allows you to use your own GeckoLib models as cosmetic outfits split into Head, Body, Legs, and Feet pieces, then use and share them as Style Packs; Packs of Styles that makes it easy to share with others similar to Resource and Data packs! _BounceStyles does not come with/add any cosmetics on its own._ Info on how to create and add custom outfits can be found on our public wiki. ![](https://i.imgur.com/NxkWtaX.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/3nU0ggk.png) - Ability to register Head, Body, Legs, and Feet "Styles" - "Wardrobe" UI for equipping styles per slot, and creating outfit presets. - GeckoLib animations, with Animation States, including Walking, Sprinting, Sneaking, Swimming etc. (Full list on wiki) - Ability to specify bodyparts, armor slots, and curios/trinkets slots to hide when a Style is worn. - "Itemize" command for generating an item for unlocking specific styles (Useful for servers or Modpacks) - Style Packs allow you to easily share styles ![](https://i.imgur.com/lIeNi5u.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/dNTw4hC.png) | **Minecraft Version** | **Fabric API** | **(Neo)Forge** | **Architectury API** | **GeckoLib** | | --------------------- | --------------- | -------------------- | -------------------- | ------------ | | **1.20.1** | 0.91.0+1.20.1+ | Forge 1.20.1-47.1.0+ | 9.2.14+ | 4.7.1.2+ | | **1.21.1** | 0.102.1+1.21.1+ | NeoForge 21.1.62+ | 13.0.6+ | 4.7.5.1+ |
